name: No-Crust German Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: additional chopped nuts for garnish, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and butter or margarine over low heat; remove from heat.
2. Stir in vanilla; cool.
3. Lightly grease and flour a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. In a small bowl, combine eggs, sugar, flour, and salt.
6. Beat with an electric mixer just until blended; do not overbeat.
7. Fold in the cooled chocolate mixture; fold in the chopped walnuts.
8. Pour into prepared pie plate.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a knife inserted just off-center comes out clean.
10. Refrigerate the pie overnight before serving.
11. To serve, dollop whipped cream and garnish with additional chopped nuts if desired.
